data.name: Hentai World Fall
data.detailed_description:
Enter a serene and enchanting puzzle world where each completed level unveils stunning illustrations of charming girls. Gentle background music creates a calming atmosphere as you slide and position tiles with care, gradually revealing each picture piece by piece.

Play at your own pace with no time constraints, and enjoy the rewarding feeling of progress as challenges slowly become more intricate. Whether you're a casual player or a puzzle enthusiast, this game delivers a delightful blend of relaxation, elegance, and visual beauty.

Features:

Reveal captivating and beautifully designed girl artwork at every level

Relax with soft, soothing background music

View finished images in full-screen mode

Experience steadily increasing puzzle complexity

No timers or pressure—just play and unwind

data.short_description: Relaxing puzzle game with beautiful girl art, calming music, no time limits, and gradually increasing challenges for a peaceful, enjoyable experience.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, or 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
